slop_findings.rule: consistency — COPY.md §8 defines complete form-label bank (`Your name`, `Email`, `Phone`, `What do you need?`, `Send request`, privacy + error + success copy) but ULTIMATE_TEMPLATE.html ships form-less, so every generated build fails build_report.json `has_contact_form` check (14/15 on both smoke-test samples that reached Gemini)
slop_findings.fix: Either (a) add a minimal contact form section to ULTIMATE_TEMPLATE.html using the §8 form-label copy and keep tel-CTA as primary, OR (b) remove `has_contact_form` from generate.py's validation checklist and delete §8 form-label bank from COPY.md. Recommend (a): keeps the 15/15 gate intact and honours the existing COPY.md microcopy spec.

slop_findings.location: prompts/website_builder.md line ~46 (legacy DESIGN PHILOSOPHY block still present below the AUTHORITATIVE REFERENCES override)
slop_findings.rule: contradiction — legacy block says h1 weight 800, new block + DESIGN.md §3 cap weights at 700. Override header explicitly claims precedence so models should resolve correctly, but the contradiction is a latent footgun if a future edit reorders the blocks.
slop_findings.fix: Next patch pass: delete the contradicted lines in the legacy block (h1 weight, persona matrix, wavy dividers) rather than relying solely on the override header.

slop_findings.rule: gradient rule — hero uses radial-gradient blue glow (`rgba(37,99,235,0.18)`) over near-black. DESIGN.md §6/§7 warns against CTA glows but allows subtle hero atmosphere. Acceptable here but borderline — one shade darker would be safer.

personal_sample.error: OpenRouter API error 402: credits exhausted — 'requested up to 16000 tokens, can only afford 15448'. Retried once, persistent. NOT a template regression; infra issue escalated to team-lead.
personal_sample.note: Per template-critique skill §Failure recovery: infra/API errors unrelated to template are escalated, not masked as slop findings.

generalization_rationale: Two clean samples (trades + professional) both hit readability pass with category-appropriate accent colors (trades: #2563EB blue, professional: implicit neutral) and produce distinct copy per vertical. Third sample infra-blocked so full 3-way generalization unverified. Conservative 7 = 'all three pass validation but feel like the same template'; upgrade to 8 if personal sample reruns cleanly after credits topped up.
notes: Schema + structural checks PASS. Two of three smoke tests PASS readability + produce valid HTML. Both passing samples score 14/15 on validation because templates/ULTIMATE_TEMPLATE.html intentionally omits a contact form in favour of tel-CTA primacy — but generate.py still gates on `has_contact_form`. Systemic 14/15 on every build unless template adds a form OR validation drops the check. Third sample blocked by OpenRouter 402 credit exhaustion, not template. Verdict: fix_then_ship — engineer adds minimal contact form to ULTIMATE_TEMPLATE.html using COPY.md §8 microcopy bank, then re-run full smoke test (including rerun of personal sample after credits topped up) for ship verdict. Samples cached at .claude/skills/template-critique/samples/{trades,professional,personal}.json. Original business_details.json restored from _workspace/template/business_details_backup.json.
